## Description

With the Q²M SeatCover**, you protect seats during detailing or immediately after interior detailing to maintain the perfect condition for the owner. 
However, the Q²M SeatCover is also highly suitable for protection during storage of a classic car, for example.

Simply pull the seat cover over the seat, and it stays in place well thanks to an elastic band.
Sold individually.
